name: Smono 3 Screens
summary: Maintain the freshness of your Smono 3 with these Screens.
description: Maintain the freshness of your Smono 3 with these Screens. These screens effectively block any material from entering the vapour, ensuring the purity and flavour of the vapour. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
